summary: Verified two new features: (1) CreativeBriefCard component for displaying creative direction during AI builds, (2) SuggestionChips component with parseSuggestions utility for organic AI-driven enhancement suggestions. All code verifications passed.

creative_brief_event_emission.code: yield { event: 'creative_brief', data: { mood: designBrief.mood, subjects: designBrief.subjects, colors: designBrief.colors, lightingCues: designBrief.lightingCues, styleCues: designBrief.styleCues, moodParams: designBrief.moodParams } }
creative_brief_event_emission.details: creative_brief event correctly emitted after parsing the brief

enhancement_suggestions_prompt.details: ENHANCEMENT SUGGESTIONS instruction with [NEXT_STEPS]...[/NEXT_STEPS] format present in both build and refinement system prompts

login_flow.details: Login successful via Supabase Auth, dashboard loads with 'Welcome back!' toast

dashboard_load.details: Dashboard loads with prompt bar, project list, and Stock/Custom toggle visible

visual_mode_toggle.details: Stock button visible in prompt bar

creative_brief_event_in_stream_client.details: creative_brief event handler correctly added to SSE switch statement

creative_brief_card_component.details: Component renders mood with color-coded gradient backgrounds, displays subjects, colors, lighting cues. Has data-testid='creative-brief-card' and child testids for mood, subjects, colors, lighting

suggestion_chips_component.details: Component renders clickable suggestion chips with data-testid='suggestion-chips' and 'suggestion-chip-{i}'. Exports parseSuggestions utility function

parse_suggestions_utility.details: Regex /\[NEXT_STEPS\]([\s\S]*?)\[\/NEXT_STEPS\]/ correctly parses markers, splits on pipe |, limits to 3 suggestions, strips markers from content

left_panel_rendering.details: CreativeBriefCard rendered when message.metadata.creativeBrief exists. SuggestionChips rendered when !isMessageStreaming and suggestions.length > 0

dashboard_on_creative_brief_callback.code: onCreativeBrief: (data) => { setMessages(prev => prev.map(m => m.id === streamingAssistantId ? { ...m, metadata: { ...m.metadata, creativeBrief: data } } : m)) }
dashboard_on_creative_brief_callback.details: Callback correctly wired in streamMessage call to update message metadata with creative brief

eslint_validation.details: All new components pass ESLint with no issues

critical_code_review_comments: CreativeBriefCard correctly uses mood-based gradient backgrounds (moodColors map) for visual differentiation
SuggestionChips only renders when suggestions exist AND message is not streaming - prevents premature display
parseSuggestions correctly handles edge cases: null, empty string, no markers, >3 suggestions (sliced)
Enhancement suggestions are optional in AI prompts - only appear when AI naturally thinks of them (per user requirement)
creative_brief event emitted at line 508 after parseCreativeBrief(userMessage) at line 506

success_rate.backend: 100% (syntax check, health check, code verification all passed)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard load, visual mode toggle all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features verified: CreativeBriefCard (shows mood/subjects/colors during build) and SuggestionChips (organic AI-driven next-step suggestions parsed from [NEXT_STEPS]...[/NEXT_STEPS] markers). Both components are wired through SSE events. The creative_brief event is emitted at service.js:508 and handled in stream-client.js:91. Suggestions only appear when AI naturally includes them in response - not after every message. Frontend supervisor being FATAL is expected - only nextjs_api matters.
